allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('/c/Users/julie/Downloads/AB-730/index.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/const questions=\(\\[[\\s\\S]*?\\]\);/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('Pattern not found'\);process.exit\(1\);}const arr=eval\(m[1]\);console.log\('Total questions:',arr.length\);console.log\('First Q:',arr[0].q.slice\(0,80\)\);console.log\('Last Q:',arr[arr.length-1].q.slice\(0,80\)\);")
